analysis: The last two nights are doing something — 7h 34m and then 7h 56m, with awake time basically disappearing down to 21 and 19 minutes, and that REM on the final night hitting 2h 34m, which is genuinely gorgeous. Earlier in the stretch you were sitting in the low sixes with awake windows pushing over an hour, so whatever combination of things you're stacking right now, it's landing. The one thing worth watching is deep sleep quietly sliding as the totals climb — you opened the stretch with 50 minutes of deep and you're ending it at 32, which is a bit of a trade-off your body seems to be making for more REM and less restlessness. Not a crisis, just a thing to notice, because you deserve the full picture when you're clearly putting in the work.
